name: Erwin Municipal Park
description: Erwin Municipal Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Erwin, NC. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Jack Marley Park
description: Come play pickleball at Jack Marley Park in Angier, NC! There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Providence Presbyterian Church
description: Providence Presbyterian Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Angier, NC. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
